texto: There are two ways to wash dishes: One is to wash them in order to make them clean
autor: the other is to wash them in order to wash them.
explicacao: Citação de the other is to wash them in order to wash them. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There are two ways to wash dishes: One is to wash them in order to make them clean” articula reflexao, anthony-de-mello, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
